title: Build Main Window Layout with Split View Architecture
description: Create the main window structure using NavigationSplitView or HSplitView. The layout needs: left sidebar for file browser, center main area for terminal/editor, right panel for Kanban board and agent columns. Make panels resizable and collapsible.
acceptance_criteria: Panels are resizable with drag handles
Minimum widths prevent UI from breaking
agent_output: Build compilation errors fixed: RTIcon duplicate raw values, ErrorAlertView onChange, Color.rtTextDisabled, FileBrowserView ViewBuilder limit. App compiles successfully.
